mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_cooperation_party ( organ_id, organ_name, organ_gateway, cooperation_type, start_date, end_date, agreement_file_path, sla_uptime_target, sla_response_time, health_score, data_sent_count, data_received_count, cooperation_status, initiated_by_us, created_by, created_by_name, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{organId}, #{organName}, #{organGateway}, #{cooperationType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{agreementFilePath}, COALESCE(#{slaUptimeTarget}, 99.9), COALESCE(#{slaResponseTime}, 3000), COALESCE(#{healthScore}, 100), COALESCE(#{dataSentCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{dataReceivedCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{cooperationStatus}, 0), COALESCE(#{initiatedByUs}, 1), #{createdBy}, #{createdByName}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE node_cooperation_party
organ_name = #{organName}, organ_gateway = #{organGateway}, cooperation_type = #{cooperationType}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, agreement_file_path = #{agreementFilePath}, sla_uptime_target = #{slaUptimeTarget}, sla_response_time = #{slaResponseTime}, health_score = #{healthScore}, cooperation_status = #{cooperationStatus}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_cooperation_party SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_cooperation_party WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT * FROM node_cooperation_party WHERE organ_id = #{organId} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE node_cooperation_party SET cooperation_status = #{cooperationStatus}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_cooperation_party SET health_score = #{healthScore}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_cooperation_party SET data_sent_count = #{dataSentCount}, data_received_count = #{dataReceivedCount}, last_activity_time = NOW(), update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_cooperation_party SET last_activity_time = NOW(), update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_cooperation_party WHERE cooperation_status = 1 AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY last_activity_time DESC
SELECT * FROM node_cooperation_party WHERE cooperation_status = 1 AND end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY end_date ASC
SELECT * FROM node_cooperation_party WHERE health_score < #{threshold} AND cooperation_status = 1 AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY health_score ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE node_cooperation_party SET cooperation_status = 3, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_cooperation_party SET end_date = #{newEndDate}, cooperation_status = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
